setting_json: Breakfast: Full Irish breakfast every morning
Luggage Transfer: Daily transfer of your main bag between accommodations
Personalised Itinerary and route app for your smart phone that keeps you on the trail at all times.
Support: 24/7 emergency support throughout your holiday
Pre-Departure Pack: Information pack sent before you travel, so you know exactly what to expect
Flights: Travel to Ireland is not included
Insurance: You will need travel and walking holiday insurance
Meals: Lunches and dinners are not included (though we will recommend great local spots)
Packed Lunches: You can arrange these with your accommodation or buy picnic supplies en route
